title: Session creation dialog with name input and UI toggle
purpose: Provides a dialog interface for users to create new collaboration sessions by entering a name and choosing whether to use browser UI for questions.
module_context: Exports a React functional component that renders a modal dialog with form inputs and handles user interactions for session creation.

steps.content: Initialize state for session name and UI preference.
Define handler for confirming the session creation with validated input.
Define handler for keyboard events to support Enter and Escape keys.
Render the dialog structure with header, form inputs, and footer controls.
Display session name input field with auto-focus and validation.
Render browser UI toggle switch with descriptive labels.
Show cancel and create buttons with appropriate styling and disabled states.
Validate that the session name is not empty after trimming whitespace.
IF the session name is valid, call the confirm callback with the name and UI preference.
Check if the Enter key was pressed and the session name is valid.
IF Enter is pressed with valid input, trigger the confirm action.
IF the Escape key is pressed, trigger the close action.
